description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled brown roof and white exterior walls. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and features a spacious backyard with a freeform swimming pool, a round above-ground pool, and a paved patio area with outdoor furniture. The front yard includes a driveway, a two-car garage, manicured shrubs, and a blossoming tree, while the rear of the house has a raised deck with stairs leading down to the yard. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facade, including a prominent set of large windows facing the backyard. The architectural style blends traditional and modern suburban elements, with a focus on comfort and outdoor living.
description: A large, white suburban house with a brown multi-gabled roof, fenced yard, pools, and a two-car garage. Features include a raised deck, manicured landscaping, and numerous windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car garage, driveway, manicured shrubs, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, above-ground pool, patio furniture, and the rear deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the raised deck, large windows, freeform swimming pool, and fenced yard.
description_view_3: Side/front view with the garage doors, driveway, and a clear view of the front landscaping and entry path.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and varied window sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, steps, double doors, and decorative landscaping with shrubs and a flowering tree.
